metadata.title: DLG Tech — Senior Architect-Led Engineering Team
metadata.description: 14 years of experience. US standards. Managed execution. Silicon Valley quality architecture at rational rates.

hero.subtitle: 14 years of experience. US standards. Managed execution.
hero.description: I handle the architecture and quality. My vetted team handles the code. You get Silicon Valley results at rational rates.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A proven model that eliminates the risks of outsourcing. You deal with one person — your architect.
howItWorks.step1Description: Eugene designs the system architecture, defines technical specs, and translates your business requirements into actionable engineering tasks.
howItWorks.step2Description: Vetted Senior Engineers build the core. Silent, focused execution by professionals with 5–10+ years of experience.
howItWorks.step3Description: Every pull request is reviewed by Eugene before it hits production. Zero compromises on code quality.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: Modern, battle-tested technologies for every layer of your product.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: A handpicked squad of senior engineers, led by a US-based architect.
team.leadBio: 14+ years of experience across US and European tech companies. Your single point of contact — perfect English, US time zone overlap, architect-level technical depth.
team.teamDescription: Vetted senior and middle+ engineers from Eastern Europe. Each with 5–10+ years in fintech, healthtech, and SaaS.

cta.title: Ready to Build?
cta.subtitle: Get Silicon Valley quality architecture at rational rates. Let's discuss your project.
